# Current Priorities

Learning Python for Analytics to a similar level as R

Preparing projects for upload/rendering for this website

Shiny App that allows you to give your types of data which returns common options for analysis and visualization in R

Shiny App for nutrition information based on body size; will give micro and macro nutrients

### Smaller Projects

Learning Swift, Docker

Create a couple of plot options for regression assumptions

Creating a general R package of things I commonly use and have to re-write

### Topics being learned or Reviewed

Review of College mathmatics and probability

Statistical Learning

Tree's and Machine learning methods in python
